911.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Hasan ibn Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ taught him these words for the Qunut prayer: 'Allahumma ihdini fiman hadayta, wa afini fiman afayta, wa tawallani fiman tawallayta, wa barik li fima a'tayta, wa qini sharra ma qadayta, fa innaka taqdi wa la yuqda alayk, wa innahu la yadhillu man walayta. Tabarakta Rabbana wa ta'alayt.'
911.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Hasan ibn Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengajarkannya kata-kata ini untuk doa qunut: 'Allahumma ihdini fiman hadayta, wa afini fiman afayta, wa tawallani fiman tawallayta, wa barik li fima a'tayta, wa qini sharra ma qadayta, fa innaka taqdi wa la yuqda alayk, wa innahu la yadhillu man walayta. Tabarakta Rabbana wa ta'alayt.'

912.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Qunut supplication continues: 'You decree and none decrees over You; none is humiliated whom You have befriended. Blessed are You, our Lord, and Exalted.'
912.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa doa qunut berlanjut: 'Engkau memutuskan dan tidak ada yang memutuskan atas-Mu; tidak ada yang dihinakan oleh orang yang telah Engkau jadikan sebagai wali. Maha Suci Engkau, ya Rabb kami, dan Maha Tinggi.'

913.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'This night vigil is a serious and weighty matter. When one of you performs Witr, let him pray two rak'ahs. If he rises in the last part of the night, that will make what he has prayed an even number, and it will be pleasing.'
913.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Thawban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Berjaga malam ini adalah perkara yang berat dan serius. Apabila salah seorang dari kalian mengerjakan Witir, hendaklah ia shalat dua rakaat. Jika ia bangun di akhir malam, itu akan menjadikan apa yang telah ia shalat genap, dan itu lebih menyenangkan.'

914.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform the Qunut (supplication) when he intended to curse someone or supplicate for someone, after the ruku. Sometimes when he said 'Sami'allahu liman hamidah, Rabbana lakal-hamd' he would add a supplication.
914.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa melakukan qunut (doa) ketika beliau bermaksud mengutuk seseorang atau mendoakan seseorang, setelah ruku. Kadang-kadang ketika beliau mengucapkan 'Sami'allahu liman hamidah, Rabbana lakal-hamd' beliau menambahkan doa.

915.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) about the qunut that he said it was before the ruku. He then said someone else claimed it was after the ruku, and he said: 'He is wrong.' Then he narrated that the Prophet ﷺ performed the qunut for a month after the ruku, cursing certain Arab tribes.
915.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tentang qunut bahwa ia mengatakan dilakukan sebelum ruku. Kemudian ia berkata seseorang lain mengklaim itu dilakukan setelah ruku, dan ia berkata: 'Dia salah.' Kemudian ia meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ melakukan qunut selama sebulan setelah ruku, mengutuk suku-suku Arab tertentu.

916.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Bara' ibn Azib (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to perform the qunut in the Fajr and Maghrib prayers.
916.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Bara' ibn Azib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa melakukan qunut dalam shalat Subuh dan Maghrib.

917.iwh_en: It was narrated from a companion that someone asked whether the Prophet ﷺ performed qunut before or after the ruku. He said: 'After the ruku, for a brief period.' Abu Muhammad (al-Darimi) said: 'I follow and act upon this, and I see it as done only in the Witr prayer.'
917.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat bahwa seseorang bertanya apakah Nabi ﷺ melakukan qunut sebelum atau sesudah ruku. Dia berkata: 'Setelah ruku, untuk waktu yang singkat.' Abu Muhammad (al-Darimi) berkata: 'Aku mengikuti dan mengamalkan ini, dan aku melihatnya hanya dilakukan dalam shalat Witir.'

918.iwh_en: It was narrated from Buraydah ibn al-Husayb (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to eat on the day of Eid al-Fitr before going out (for prayer), and would not eat on the day of Eid al-Adha until he had prayed.
918.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Buraydah ibn al-Husayb (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa makan pada hari Idul Fitri sebelum keluar (untuk shalat), dan tidak makan pada hari Idul Adha hingga beliau selesai shalat.

919.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I attended the prayer with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on an Eid day. He began with the prayer before the khutbah, without adhan or iqamah.'
919.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku hadir dalam shalat bersama Rasulullah ﷺ pada hari Eid. Beliau memulai dengan shalat sebelum khutbah, tanpa adzan atau iqamah.'

920.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I testify regarding the Messenger of Allah ﷺ that he began with the prayer before the khutbah.'
920.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku bersaksi tentang Rasulullah ﷺ bahwa beliau memulai dengan shalat sebelum khutbah.'

921.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I was present when the Prophet ﷺ, Abu Bakr, Umar, and Uthman all prayed (the Eid prayer) before the khutbah.'
921.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku hadir ketika Nabi ﷺ, Abu Bakr, Umar, dan Utsman semuanya shalat (shalat Eid) sebelum khutbah.'

922.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ went out on the day of Eid al-Fitr and prayed two rak'ahs, neither praying before nor after them.
922.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ keluar pada hari Idul Fitri dan shalat dua rakaat, tidak shalat sebelum maupun sesudahnya.

923.iwh_en: It was narrated from a companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to say the takbir in the two Eid prayers: seven in the first rak'ah and five in the second, and the recitation came after the takbirs in both.
923.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa bertakbir dalam dua shalat Eid: tujuh kali di rakaat pertama dan lima kali di rakaat kedua, dan bacaan dilakukan setelah takbir-takbir di keduanya.

924.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Nu'man ibn Bashir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to recite in the two Eid prayers and Friday: Sabbih isma Rabbik al-A'la (Surah al-A'la) and Hal ataka hadith al-Ghashiyah (Surah al-Ghashiyah).
924.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Nu'man ibn Bashir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa membaca dalam dua shalat Eid dan Jumat: Sabbih isma Rabbik al-A'la (Surah al-A'la) dan Hal ataka hadith al-Ghashiyah (Surah al-Ghashiyah).

925.iwh_en: It was narrated from a man who performed the Hajj with his father and uncle that his father said to him: 'Do you see that rider on the red camel who is speaking? That is the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.'
925.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang laki-laki yang melaksanakan haji bersama ayah dan pamannya bahwa ayahnya berkata kepadanya: 'Apakah kamu melihat pengendara di atas unta merah yang sedang berbicara itu? Itu adalah Rasulullah ﷺ.'

926.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Atiyyah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded them to bring out the women — including menstruating ones — for the Eid prayers. The menstruating ones were to stand apart from the prayer area but witness the goodness and the supplication of the Muslims. She asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, what if one of them does not have a jilbab?' He said: 'Let her sister lend her one of her garments.'
926.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Atiyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan mereka untuk membawa keluar para perempuan — termasuk yang sedang haid — untuk shalat Eid. Yang sedang haid hendaklah berdiri terpisah dari area shalat tetapi menyaksikan kebaikan dan doa kaum Muslim. Dia bertanya: 'Wahai Rasulullah, bagaimana jika salah seorang dari mereka tidak memiliki jilbab?' Beliau bersabda: 'Biarkan saudaranya meminjamkan salah satu pakaiannya.'

927.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ addressed the women on Eid day and urged them to give charity, reminded them of the Fire. A woman from the lower rows, sallow-cheeked, stood and said: 'Why, O Messenger of Allah?' He said: 'Because you complain much and are ungrateful to your husbands.'
927.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ menyampaikan khutbah kepada para perempuan pada hari Eid dan mendesak mereka untuk bersedekah, mengingatkan mereka tentang neraka. Seorang perempuan dari barisan belakang yang pucat pipinya berdiri dan berkata: 'Mengapa, wahai Rasulullah?' Beliau bersabda: 'Karena kalian banyak mengeluh dan tidak bersyukur kepada suami-suami kalian.'

928.iwh_en: It was narrated from a companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked about whether the Messenger of Allah ﷺ witnessed two Eids occurring on the same day. He said: 'Yes.' He asked: 'How did he handle it?' He said: 'He prayed the Eid prayer, then gave permission regarding Friday, saying: Whoever wishes to pray Friday, let him pray.'
928.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia ditanya tentang apakah Rasulullah ﷺ pernah menyaksikan dua Eid pada hari yang sama. Dia berkata: 'Ya.' Ditanya: 'Bagaimana beliau menanganinya?' Dia berkata: 'Beliau shalat Eid, kemudian memberikan keringanan mengenai Jumat, bersabda: Barangsiapa yang ingin shalat Jumat, hendaklah ia shalat.'

929.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to go out to the Eid prayer by one route and return by a different route.
929.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa pergi ke shalat Eid melalui satu jalan dan kembali melalui jalan yang berbeda.
